name: GRAVES DISEASE
definition: DIFFUSE TOXIC GOITER autoimmune disorder antibodies binding to TSH receptors (LATS) with inhibitory +
dominant_finding: global enlargement of 2-3 times the normal size
discriminating_features: gland may be normal in size in early stage
incidental nodules superimposed on preexisting adenomatous goiter (5%)
global enlargement of 2-3 times the normal size

general: gland may be normal in size in early stage
incidental nodules superimposed on preexisting adenomatous goiter (5%)

clinical.Cx: 10-30% develop hypothyroidism within 1st year + 3% per year rate thereafter
